attacking_style: Opportunistic rather than aggressive - shows willingness to enter breaks but conserves energy by minimizing workload, positioning for late placement rather than driving the action.

vulnerability: Reliance on tactical freeloading requires disorganized or undisciplined breakaway companions; organized groups would likely force cooperation or isolate non-contributors.
